name: filebrowser
readme_summary: FileBrowser Quantum is a self-hosted, web-based file manager that offers advanced features for managing files, users, and access permissions. It aims to be a user-friendly and powerful alternative to existing solutions, with a focus on a streamlined configuration and an efficient user interface.
key_features: OIDC, LDAP, JWT, password + 2FA, and proxy login support
Sqlite indexing with real-time search and updates
primary_use_case: Self-hosted web-based file management and administration.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic file cabinet with a glowing monitor screen for a face, standing in a clean, modern digital library. The file cabinet is actively sorting and organizing streams of data represented as colorful, glowing orbs, placing them into its drawers. Small, subtle UI elements like sliders and toggles are visible on its 'body'. The scene is bright and inviting, with a focus on ease of use and organization. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, flat design aesthetic and vibrant colors, emphasizing the 'FileBrowser Quantum' name subtly etched on the cabinet.

name: neohtop
description: 💪🏻 Blazing-fast system monitoring for your desktop (built with Rust, Tauri & Svelte)
readme_summary: NeoHtop is a modern, cross-platform desktop system monitor built with Rust, Tauri, and Svelte. It provides real-time process monitoring, CPU and memory usage tracking, advanced search and filtering, and process management features in a visually appealing UI.
primary_use_case: Desktop system monitoring and process management
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital conductor standing at a grand console, orchestrating a symphony of system processes. The console displays glowing, dynamic charts representing CPU and memory usage, with individual process 'instruments' clearly labeled and highlighted. The conductor uses a glowing baton to 'pin' critical processes, making them stand out. Subtle UI elements and data streams flow across the console, hinting at the underlying technology. The scene is set in a futuristic, dimly lit control room with a clean, organized aesthetic. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing clarity and the flow of information, with a cool, tech-focused color palette.

name: LUKSbox
description: Store sensitive files in the cloud, or on shared media without trusting the host. LUKSbox is a Rust-based encrypted-container tool with passphrase, FIDO2 (YubiKey, Titan, Nitrokey, Windows Hello), TPM 2.0/SEP, and hybrid post-quantum (ML-KEM-768 / 1024) keyslots. Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows.
readme_summary: LUKSbox is a Rust-based tool for creating encrypted file containers (vaults) that can be securely stored on untrusted media like cloud storage or USB drives. It supports modern and post-quantum cryptographic keys, including FIDO2 hardware keys and TPM, and mounts as a virtual drive on major operating systems.
key_features: Encrypted container creation for sensitive files
Support for passphrase, FIDO2, TPM 2.0/SEP, and hybrid post-quantum keys (ML-KEM)
Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows
Tamper-evident and opaque to cloud providers
Detachable header and post-quantum sidecar options
primary_use_case: Securely storing and accessing sensitive files on untrusted or shared storage media, such as cloud services or external drives, with advanced cryptographic protection.
cover_image_prompt: A medieval scribe meticulously crafting a highly ornate, locked chest from raw, glowing digital data streams. The chest is then placed onto a conveyor belt heading towards a vast, shadowy warehouse labeled 'Cloud Storage'. A small, stylized YubiKey and a TPM chip sit protectively near the scribe's hand. Subtle, abstract representations of quantum entanglement patterns emanate from a separate, smaller box labeled 'Post-Quantum Key'. The overall mood is one of secure craftsmanship against an uncertain digital future. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear iconography and a slightly futuristic, yet grounded aesthetic, emphasizing the secure transfer of data.

name: TempFastMail
description: Self Hosted Temporary Fast Email Box
readme_summary: TempFastMail is a self-hosted, disposable email inbox solution built with PHP and React. It allows users to receive and display emails temporarily, with automatic deletion after 48 hours, ensuring privacy. It's designed for quick setup using Docker Compose and integration with services like Cloudflare Email Workers.
primary_use_case: To provide a temporary, self-hosted email inbox for receiving and viewing emails without long-term storage, enhancing privacy and offering a disposable email solution.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, stylized mailbox that is transparent, showing emails briefly appearing inside before dissolving into digital dust. A small, friendly robot is shown placing an incoming email into the mailbox, while another email is seen fading away. Subtle UI elements resembling a clean, modern inbox interface are visible on a small floating screen nearby. The overall scene is bright and clean, set against a soft, abstract background with subtle binary code patterns. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a friendly and approachable aesthetic, emphasizing the temporary nature of the emails.

name: flutter-agent-panel
description: A modern, user-friendly terminal emulator designed to enhance your AI pair‑coding experience.
readme_summary: Flutter Agent Panel is a cross-platform desktop application that unifies a terminal emulator with AI agent management. It allows developers to organize their CLI tools and AI assistants within distinct workspaces, streamlining AI-powered pair-coding and command-line workflows.
key_features: AI Agent Integration (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, etc.)
primary_use_case: Enhancing AI pair-coding and developer workflow by unifying terminal emulation and AI agent management in a cross-platform desktop application.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled conductor leading an orchestra of diverse AI agents and terminal windows. The conductor, representing the Flutter Agent Panel, uses a sleek, modern baton to seamlessly switch between different musical sections (workspaces), each playing a unique tune (terminal command or AI response). Digital notes and code snippets float around the orchestra, representing the flow of information. Subtle UI elements of the app are visible on a nearby console. The scene is set in a futuristic, organized concert hall with a clean, vibrant color palette. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration, emphasizing clarity and the harmonious integration of complex tools.
